overrides.override_summary: Curable defaults get 60-day cure period; specific enumerated non-curable defaults replacing FA §16.2
overrides.why_it_matters: Broader cure rights for CA franchisees; franchisor cannot terminate for general defaults without 60-day cure

overrides.override_summary: Post-term noncompete void under B&P Code §16600
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees can immediately compete after termination/expiration — critical freedom

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration in Seattle may not be enforceable under CA law
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees may dispute in CA rather than WA

overrides.override_summary: CA Franchise Investment Law and Franchise Relations Act apply regardless of WA choice of law
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchise protections override WA law for CA franchisees

overrides.override_summary: Maximum interest rate 10% annually (vs FA's 18%/year = 1.5%/mo)
overrides.why_it_matters: Caps late fee exposure for CA franchisees

overrides.override_summary: Cannot waive rights under CA Corp Code §31512 or B&P Code §20010
overrides.why_it_matters: Renewal/transfer releases cannot extinguish CA franchise law claims

overrides.override_summary: 7-day pre-execution disclosure requirement
overrides.why_it_matters: Standard Hawaii timing requirement

overrides.override_summary: Illinois law governs the FA
overrides.why_it_matters: IL franchise protections apply

overrides.override_summary: Forum outside Illinois void (arbitration outside IL permitted)
overrides.why_it_matters: IL franchisees cannot be forced to litigate in WA

overrides.override_summary: General release excludes MD Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchise law claims survive renewal/transfer releases

overrides.override_summary: Disputed whether enforceable under Federal Arbitration Act
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchisees may have right to file lawsuit in MD

overrides.override_summary: Termination only for good cause; 30-day cure required
overrides.why_it_matters: Stronger termination protections than base FA

overrides.override_summary: Non-renewal requires fair market value compensation for inventory, equipment, fixtures
overrides.why_it_matters: MI franchisees get FMV compensation on non-renewal (not just book value)

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration/litigation outside MI void
overrides.why_it_matters: MI franchisees dispute in MI

overrides.override_summary: Transfer refusal only for good cause (enumerated)
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot unreasonably refuse transfer

overrides.override_summary: Litigation outside MN prohibited; no jury waiver; no liquidated damages/termination penalties
overrides.why_it_matters: Full litigation rights preserved in MN

overrides.override_summary: 90-day notice of termination (60-day cure); 180-day notice of non-renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: Substantially longer cure and notice periods than base FA

overrides.override_summary: Prohibited entirely
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchisees never required to sign general releases

overrides.override_summary: No liquidated damages, termination penalties, or judgment notes
overrides.why_it_matters: Blocks loss of future royalties claim and other penalty provisions

overrides.override_summary: GBL Article 33 rights preserved; anti-waiver provisions
overrides.why_it_matters: NY franchise law claims survive releases

overrides.override_summary: Post-term noncompete generally unenforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisees can compete freely post-term

overrides.override_summary: ND law governs; ND venue
overrides.why_it_matters: Dispute resolution in ND, not WA

overrides.override_summary: Not required for renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: Renewal without release for ND franchisees

overrides.override_summary: Mediation/arbitration must be near franchisee's place of business
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot force ND franchisees to travel to WA

overrides.override_summary: Forum restriction void under RI Franchise Investment Act
overrides.why_it_matters: RI franchisees dispute in RI

overrides.override_summary: RI law applies
overrides.why_it_matters: RI franchise protections apply

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration/mediation in WA or mutually agreed location
overrides.why_it_matters: Already WA-based so minimal practical impact

overrides.override_summary: Only via negotiated settlement with independent counsel after FA in effect
overrides.why_it_matters: Blanket releases at renewal/transfer void; must be negotiated

overrides.override_summary: Void for employees <$100K/year (RCW 49.62.020); post-term limited to 25mi of outlet only
overrides.why_it_matters: Narrower noncompete scope; employee noncompetes largely void

overrides.override_summary: Transfer fees limited to reasonable estimated/actual costs of effecting transfer
overrides.why_it_matters: $10,000 fee may be challenged if exceeds actual costs

overrides.override_summary: Good cause required; 90-day notice; 60-day cure under Fair Dealership Law
overrides.why_it_matters: WI franchisees get additional termination protections
